name: test
supported_scope: Test portal account, billing, and inventory support.

client.welcome_template: Hi{name_part} I am ChatterRax, a Test Support bot here to help you out.

test portal.label: Test Portal
test portal.follow_up: Tell me what part of the Test Portal failed.
test portal.reply_opener: For Test Portal, start with the page, action, and exact error.

billing portal.label: Billing Portal
billing portal.follow_up: Tell me which billing action failed.
billing portal.reply_opener: For Billing Portal, start with the invoice or payment action.

inventory.label: Inventory
inventory.follow_up: Tell me which inventory item or SKU failed.
inventory.reply_opener: For Inventory, start with the SKU and action.

sign_in.wrap_up: If sign-in still fails, keep the exact Test Portal error message.

sync.wrap_up: If it still does not update, keep the affected record or SKU.

payment.wrap_up: If billing still fails, keep the invoice number and payment status.

billing portal|payment: Billing Portal payment issues need the invoice, amount, and payment status checked first.
Open the invoice details page and confirm whether the payment shows pending, failed, or posted.
If the status is failed, keep the error message shown on the payment page.
test portal|sign_in: Test Portal sign-in needs the account and browser path checked first.
Try a private browser window and confirm the account shown on the sign-in page.

knowledge_resources.title: Test Portal login fails
steps: Open the Test Portal in a private browser window.
Confirm the account email shown on the sign-in page.
If login still fails, copy the exact Test Portal error message.

knowledge_resources.title: Billing Portal payment is stuck
steps: Confirm whether the payment status is pending, failed, or posted.
If it is failed, keep the payment page error message for support.

knowledge_resources.title: Inventory stock is not updating
steps: Refresh the inventory page and confirm whether the stock count changes.
If it remains stale, keep the SKU and last update time.

extra_rules: Stay inside Test Support. Do not route to services outside this pack.
